title: AIF is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: AIF is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
AIF invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Subject Matter Expert at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About AIF:
AIF is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIF!
